[![](https://www.change-well.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/1128/2026/05/2-Wind-pic-of-112-676x501.jpeg)](https://www.change-well.com/therapy-and-psychological-testing-services/ "Therapy and Psychological Testing Services")

# Therapy and Psychological Testing Services

Change-Well provides therapy and psychological testing services for children, adolescents, adults, couples, and families. Our clinicians offer evidence-based care designed to support emotional well-being, clarity, and long-term growth.

* * *

**Psychological Evaluations**

Comprehensive psychological testing and diagnostic clarification for:

- ADHD
- Autism
- Anxiety and depression
- Mood and personality disorders
- Diagnostic clarification
- Learning differences
- Bariatric or surgical readiness evaluations

* * *

**Therapy Services**

Therapy is available for individuals, couples, and families experiencing:

- Anxiety
- Depression
- Trauma
- Family conflict and family counseling
- Life transitions
- Loss and grief
- Relationship concerns
- Substance abuse
- Eating disorders

_**Sessions are available in person in Plano or through secure telehealth.**_

* * *

**Group Therapy and Classes**

Change-Well offers group-based services designed to provide support, education, and skill-building in a collaborative environment.

Group services may include:

- Therapy groups focused on shared experiences and support
- Skills-based groups for coping, communication, and emotional regulation
- Parent training groups
- Educational workshops and classes

_Group sessions allow participants to learn from one another, build community, and practice new strategies in a supportive setting._

* * *

**Coaching and Training**

Change-Well also offers coaching and training opportunities, including:

- Parent training
- Coaching classes
- Performance coaching
- Intensive couples retreats
- Workshops and educational programs

## Footer

![Change-Well.com](https://www.change-well.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/1128/2020/02/Change-Well-Logo-White-01.png)

Find help in person or through teletherapy (video conferencing) for Depression, Anxiety or Fears, ADHD and other mental health diagnoses, Relationship and Marriage Counseling, Trauma and PTSD, Couples Therapy, Family Therapy, High Conflict Divorce, Individuals Recovering from Parental Alienation, and Life Transitions, for healthier living, better balance and overall wellness. Obtain an accurate diagnosis/diagnosis clarification, a psychological report or assessment for upcoming surgery or for your prescribing physician or psychiatrist.
